subcodes.first_line: Say: O peoples of the earth! Fie upon you and upon that which your hands have wrought in these days wherein the Spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل ان یا اهل الارض اف لکم و بما اکتسبت ایدیکم فی هذه الایام التی کان الروح
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
